{{define "page-main"}}

{{with .Page.Params.heroTitle}}{{.}}{{else}}{{.Site.Title}}{{end}}

{{with .Page.Params.heroLead}}{{.}}{{else}}{{.Site.Description}}{{end}}

{{with .Page.Params.heroPrimaryURL}}{{with $.Page.Params.heroPrimaryText}}{{.}}{{else}}Get started{{end}}{{end}} {{with .Site.Params.github}}View on GitHub{{end}}
{{if .Page.ContentHTML}}
{{rawHTML .Page.ContentHTML}}
{{end}} {{$features := where (where .Site.Pages "Kind" "section").ByWeight "Params.featured" true}} {{if $features}}
{{range $features}} {{with .LinkTitle}}{{.}}{{else}}{{.Title}}{{end}} {{with .Description}}{{.}}{{end}} {{end}}
{{end}}
{{end}}
